title: TradeSpire
description: A useful trading plugin with vault compatibility
body:
🛒 TradeSpire – The Ultimate GUI-Based Player Trading System for Minecraft Servers API Version: 1.21 Dependency: Vault (optional for economy support) Main Command: /trade (aliases: /ts, /tradespire) **✨ What is TradeSpire?** TradeSpire is a sleek and intuitive GUI-based player trading plugin designed for Minecraft servers running version 1.20 or above. With a clean interface, customizable layout, and built-in Vault economy integration, TradeSpire revolutionizes how players interact and trade with one another. Whether it's items or in-game currency, TradeSpire provides a secure, seamless, and immersive trading experience. 🎮 Key Features 🔄 GUI-Powered Trading Say goodbye to clunky chest trades or dropped items. TradeSpire uses a custom-designed GUI with clearly defined trading slots for two players: Player One: Left side slots Player Two: Right side slots A divider panel, accept/decline buttons, and an interactive money add-on option ensure clarity and security in every trade. 💰 Vault Economy Integration If your server uses Vault and a compatible economy plugin, players can trade money along with items! They’ll see their current balance and can add up to a maximum configurable amount (default: 1,000,000) to any trade. 🧩 Configurable GUI Layout Every GUI element is fully configurable: Inventory title and size (up to 54 slots) Slot positions for both players Materials, names, and lore for all control items (e.g., emerald blocks for acceptance, gold ingots for adding money) This means server owners can personalize the interface to match the server's theme or branding. **📢 Customizable Messages** TradeSpire’s message system uses placeholders like %player% and %balance%, allowing for: Easy localization Branding through color codes Full customization of trade-related messages (e.g., request sent/received, accepted, denied, expired, etc.) ** ✅ Lightweight Permissions** TradeSpire uses a single permission node: tradespire.use – Allows players to use all trade functionalities. Default: True – so all players can jump into trading right away! **🚀 Why Choose TradeSpire?** User-Friendly: With intuitive GUI controls, it’s accessible to casual players and power users alike. Secure: Players must mutually agree to complete a trade—no risk of item loss or scams. Server-Friendly: Lightweight and compatible with most setups. Highly Customizable: From GUI layout to lore, you control the experience. Future-Proof: Built for Minecraft 1.20+, ensuring modern plugin architecture and compatibility. Integrated Economy: Optional Vault support means item + money trading just works. ** 🔧 Commands Overview** /trade – Send a trade request /trade accept – Accept an incoming request /trade deny – Deny a trade request /trade help – View help and command list Also usable via aliases /ts and /tradespire for convenience. **💬 Final Thoughts** TradeSpire is a must-have plugin for any Minecraft server that wants to enhance player interaction, economy functionality, and trading immersion. Whether you're running a survival, RPG, or factions server—TradeSpire ensures your community can trade smarter, faster, and safer.
